column1: # Claim 2A — does GET driver_score add over a signed-Δaccessibility baseline? 2026-07-15.
# GET only (sole model with a rankable Claim-1 signal). Systems where Claim 1 was positive:
#   mouse MEF->mES (GSE201577 clean) and human fib->iN (GSE299923).
# Harness: scripts/eval_driver_claim2.py. signed-Δ promoted from Claim-1 confound to a
#   competing scorer. mode=opening-only is the primary test (matches Claim 1: |signed-Δ|-
#   matched background restricted to opening regions); mode=all-regions lets signed-Δ keep
#   its full magnitude power (a tougher baseline). Report AUROC head-to-head, paired-bootstrap
#   ΔAUROC CI, and an incremental LR test (does driver improve label~signed?). perm p on LR.
# Contracts + signed tracks on PeiLab2 /mnt3/wuyuhao/{claim1_work,in_clean}/ (no re-embedding).
